response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages required for this role, and has no demonstrated work in routing, geospatial data processing, or navigation systems. While his background in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and open-source contributions is notable, it does not align closely enough with the core responsibilities or technical stack of the role.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications using DLang and Node.js
Experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions
Proven expertise in system design, testing, and CI/CD pipelines across multiple projects
concerns: Limited or no experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages specified for this role
No direct experience with routing data pipelines, navigation systems, or geospatial data optimization
Most recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) focus on TypeScript and AI-agent infrastructure, not geospatial routing
